'''chajate''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adverbs|adverb]] meaning "[[Wikt:bacchanalianly|bacchanalianly]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ch-j-z
|-
! Word class
| [[Adverb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:bacchanalianly|bacchanalianly]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| chajate
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].[[present]] || [[word:chajate|chajate]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]] || [[word:chajatesher|chajatesher]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:chajatesherĂ«m|chajatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:chajatero|chajatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:chajateshĂ«|chajateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:chajateshĂ«m|chajateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokichajatero|gokichajatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokichajateshĂ«|gokichajateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokichajateshĂ«m|gokichajateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gochajankerom|gochajankerom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gochajankeshĂ«|gochajankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gochajankeshĂ«m|gochajankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gochajankeya|gochajankeya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:chajaterom|chajaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:chajatemu|chajatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:chajateya|chajateya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokichajaterom|gokichajaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokichajatemu|gokichajatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokichajateya|gokichajateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[present]] || [[word:chajajate|chajajate]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:chajajatesher|chajajatesher]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:chajajatesherĂ«m|chajajatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:chajajatero|chajajatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:chajajateshĂ«|chajajateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:chajajateshĂ«m|chajajateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokichajajatero|gokichajajatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokichajajateshĂ«|gokichajajateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokichajajateshĂ«m|gokichajajateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gochajajankerom|gochajajankerom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gochajajankeshĂ«|gochajajankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gochajajankeshĂ«m|gochajajankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gochajajankeya|gochajajankeya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:chajajaterom|chajajaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:chajajatemu|chajajatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:chajajateya|chajajateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokichajajaterom|gokichajajaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokichajajatemu|gokichajajatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokichajajateya|gokichajajateya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[present]] || [[word:chĂŠjĂŠte|chĂŠjĂŠte]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:chĂŠjĂŠtesher|chĂŠjĂŠtesher]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:chĂŠjĂŠtesherĂ«m|chĂŠjĂŠtesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:chĂŠjĂŠtero|chĂŠjĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:chĂŠjĂŠteshĂ«|chĂŠjĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:chĂŠjĂŠteshĂ«m|chĂŠjĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokichĂŠjĂŠtero|gokichĂŠjĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokichĂŠjĂŠteshĂ«|gokichĂŠjĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokichĂŠjĂŠteshĂ«m|gokichĂŠjĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gochĂŠjĂŠnkerom|gochĂŠjĂŠnkerom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gochĂŠjĂŠnkeshĂ«|gochĂŠjĂŠnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gochĂŠjĂŠnkeshĂ«m|gochĂŠjĂŠnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gochĂŠjĂŠnkeya|gochĂŠjĂŠnkeya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:chĂŠjĂŠterom|chĂŠjĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:chĂŠjĂŠtemu|chĂŠjĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:chĂŠjĂŠteya|chĂŠjĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokichĂŠjĂŠterom|gokichĂŠjĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokichĂŠjĂŠtemu|gokichĂŠjĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokichĂŠjĂŠteya|gokichĂŠjĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[present]] || [[word:chafjafte|chafjafte]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:chafjaftesher|chafjaftesher]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:chafjaftesherĂ«m|chafjaftesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:chafjaftero|chafjaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:chafjafteshĂ«|chafjafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:chafjafteshĂ«m|chafjafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokichafjaftero|gokichafjaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokichafjafteshĂ«|gokichafjafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokichafjafteshĂ«m|gokichafjafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gochafjafnkerom|gochafjafnkerom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gochafjafnkeshĂ«|gochafjafnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gochafjafnkeshĂ«m|gochafjafnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gochafjafnkeya|gochafjafnkeya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:chafjafterom|chafjafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:chafjaftemu|chafjaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:chafjafteya|chafjafteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokichafjafterom|gokichafjafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokichafjaftemu|gokichafjaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokichafjafteya|gokichafjafteya]]
|}

''76 forms generated.''

== See also ==
